tests.name: route is declared before pitch
tests.expected: Presenter command card requires choosing LIVE, RECORDED REAL RUN, LOCAL FALLBACK, or ROADMAP / NOT CONFIGURED before starting.

tests.name: spine is evidence-gated
tests.expected: Each three-minute segment lists the evidence missing condition that should stop or downgrade the claim.

tests.name: roadmap breadth wording is exact
tests.expected: The static readiness checklist line preserves roadmap language and not-legal-advice framing.

tests.name: do-not-say list blocks unsupported claims
tests.expected: Browser extension, CLI install, generated CI, dynamic readiness checks, legal compliance determinations, and unmeasured timing pass are forbidden.

tests.name: fallback language downgrades instead of inventing
tests.expected: If live endpoint or identifiers are missing, presenter downgrades to recorded/local/spec route instead of claiming live success.
